list.name: Changes
list.comment: refactor: align entity mappings with database

task.summary: refactor: correct DTOs and entity structures

feat: add debit and credit methods
feat: add payment and remove payment methods
refactor: add not null validation in transaction partialUpdate method
feat: add test classes for financialAccount and installment
feat: add resource ownership validation tests
test: seed h2 database for test environment
refactor: fix table dependencies and add composite unique key
refactor: align entity mappings with database

refactor: align entity mappings with database
